snippet.title: Dil Pe Zakhm Khate Hain (Lyric Video) | Classic Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan Qawwali
snippet.description:
💔 Dil Pe Zakhm Khate Hain is a deeply emotional qawwali performed by the legendary Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan. With powerful poetry and soulful vocals, this timeless kalam reflects the pain of love, heartbreak, and longing.

Nusrat Saab’s mesmerizing voice and passionate expression bring every word to life, making this performance a true masterpiece of Sufi and ghazal-inspired music that continues to move listeners across generations. 🎶✨

#DilPeZakhmKhateHain #nusratfatehalikhan #Qawwali

Listen Now -
Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/0BH8BBD8DKy5rOZmv5bnFH?si=d3f29b44426e441b
Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/us/song/dil-pe-zakham-khate-hain/1784727288
YouTube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=npICvoKoT0s&si=hWntgC-U3LO3JpkI

Watch More: https://www.youtube.com/@OrientalStarAgencies/playlists

Credits - 
Vocalist / Performer - Ustad Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan
Composer - Ustad Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan
Lyricist - Jigar Moradabadi

Original Label / Distributor - Oriental Star Agencies Ltd. (OSA)

Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan (13 October 1948 – 16 August 1997) was a Pakistani musician, primarily a singer of Qawwali, the devotional music of the Sufis. Widely considered one of the greatest voices ever recorded, he possessed an extraordinary range of vocal abilities and could perform at a high level of intensity for several hours. Extending the 600-year old Qawwali tradition of his family, Khan is widely credited with introducing Qawwali music to international audiences. He is popularly known as "Shahenshah-e-Qawwali", meaning "The King of Qawwali". Born in Faisalabad, Khan had his first public performance at the age of 16, at his father's chelum. He became the head of the family qawwali party in 1971. He was signed by Oriental Star Agencies, Birmingham, England. He engaged in collaborations and experiments with Western artists, becoming a well-known world music artist. He toured extensively, performing in over 40 countries

(c) Oriental Star Agencies
